events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1064. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: soy, peanut, sesame. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes kidney beans. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Bayview-Hunters Point.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/650 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓, no soy/peanut/sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/650 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–75) ✓, no soy/peanut/sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/650 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 45–75) ✓, no soy/peanut/sesame ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1064 added to route R-BAYV-1 (Bayview-Hunters Point), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1064: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
